name: Enterprise E-Commerce Data Pipeline
description: Production-grade ETL pipeline simulating a real e-commerce data warehouse. Covers ingestion from raw sources (Kafka, S3, CRM), cleansing, enrichment, aggregation, and delivery to analytics sinks.

nodes.name: Kafka Order Events
nodes.description: Real-time order events from Kafka topic 'order-events'

nodes.name: S3 Clickstream Logs
nodes.description: Web clickstream data from S3 landing zone (partitioned hourly)

nodes.name: CRM Customer Data
nodes.description: Customer master data synced daily from Salesforce CRM

nodes.name: Inventory Database
nodes.description: Product inventory data from PostgreSQL via CDC

nodes.name: Returns Feed
nodes.description: Order return events from returns management system

nodes.name: Parse & Validate Orders
nodes.description: Schema validation + remove malformed/test orders

nodes.name: Parse Clickstream
nodes.description: Extract relevant fields from raw clickstream JSON blobs

nodes.name: Deduplicate Customers
nodes.description: Remove duplicate customer records using email as dedup key

nodes.name: Session Builder
nodes.description: Group clickstream events into user sessions (30-min window)

nodes.name: Orders ⨝ Customers
nodes.description: Left join orders with customer data on customer_id

nodes.name: Orders ⨝ Products
nodes.description: Join with product catalog for category and margin info

nodes.name: Apply Returns Adjustment
nodes.description: Subtract returned items from order totals

nodes.name: Revenue by Day
nodes.description: Daily revenue aggregation by region and category

nodes.name: Customer LTV Calculation
nodes.description: Compute lifetime value per customer using historical orders

nodes.name: Conversion Funnel
nodes.description: Session-to-order conversion funnel metrics

nodes.name: Product Affinity Matrix
nodes.description: Co-purchase matrix for recommendation engine

nodes.name: Churn Feature Engineering
nodes.description: Feature extraction for churn prediction model (RFM + behavioral)

nodes.name: Orders Fact Table
nodes.description: Dimensional fact table in Redshift data warehouse

nodes.name: Revenue Dashboard
nodes.description: Tableau / PowerBI revenue dashboard dataset

nodes.name: LTV Feature Store
nodes.description: ML feature store (Feast) for LTV model training

nodes.name: Churn Model Input
nodes.description: Churn prediction model training dataset in S3

nodes.name: Recommendation Engine
nodes.description: Product affinity matrix fed to collaborative filtering model

nodes.name: Funnel Analytics Report
nodes.description: Marketing team funnel dashboard in Looker
